localObligations.name: c4_sig_calldata_layout
localObligations.obligation: The ABI anchors for `verify(bytes32,bytes)` must match the Solidity C4 verifier: sig length at calldata offset 0x44 and sig bytes at 0x64.

localObligations.name: c4_top_hash_refinement
localObligations.obligation: The `mstore` / `calldataload` / `keccak256` sequence in this frontier must match the `seed || root || R || message` framing of `src/SphincsWcFc30Asm.sol`.

localObligations.name: c4_remaining_circuit_refinement
localObligations.obligation: The remaining FORS+C, WOTS+C, and hypertree loops are not yet encoded here; this frontier currently fixes only the boundary and top-hash skeleton for C4.
